sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64548" key="*maima/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Μαιμάκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μαιμάσσω</etym>) epith. of Zeus at Athens, <sense id="n64548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boisterous, stormy</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.458b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
